name: Riya Agrawal
background: 4th year CS student at Symbiosis Institute of Technology, Pune (2027). Built a distributed microservices platform using Spring Boot, React, MongoDB, Redis and Docker. Also built RAG pipelines using LangChain and FAISS for legal document translation and government scheme navigation. Top 50 nationally at CodeCircuit Hackathon (UI/UX & Frontend Track). Active contributor at GDSC (Top 1%) and Design & Media Executive at Codex Coding Club.
